name: Pull request
about: Open a PR against main
title: "[<area>] <short description>"
labels: ""
---

**What does this PR do?**

One-paragraph summary.

**How was it tested?**

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual run with `examples/gateway/erouter.yaml`
- [ ] CI is green

**Checklist**

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (README, CHANGELOG, examples) if behaviour changed

**Related issues**

Fixes #<id>, relates to #<id>.
